title: Creamy Chargrilled Spanish Eggplant Paella
description: A solo dinner Spanish dish featuring garlic and herbal flavors, made with chargrilled eggplant and a creamy mantecare emulsification, suitable for ovo-vegetarian diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the eggplant cubes with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and black pepper, and spread on a baking sheet to roast for 30 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining olive oil over medium heat and saute the minced garlic for 1 minute.
Add the smoked paprika and saffron threads to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the arborio rice to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vegetable broth to the skillet and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the grated manchego cheese and cooked eggplant cubes.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Let the paella rest for 5 minutes before serving.
